summary: Frontend testing for new 'Consulter' button (orange pencil) and quick view modal feature. All core functionality PASSED. The 4th action button opens a read-only modal with 3 tabs (Identité, État & Tags, Localisation) displaying entity fields. Tested on Engins and Tags pages.

minor.issue: Slow response times (5-15 seconds) and occasional WebSocket connection failures - external dependency, not a code issue

engins_page.consulter_button: PASS - Orange pencil button found with data-testid='row-action-consulter'

modal_test.opens: PASS - Modal opens when clicking Consulter button
modal_test.title: VEN111-2 (entity name)
modal_test.subtitle: Consultation rapide
modal_test.fermerCloses: PASS - Modal closes via Fermer button
modal_test.xCloses: PASS - Modal closes via X button

engins_page.blue_eye_button: PASS - Still navigates to detail page (not affected by modal)

clients_page.result: NOT TESTED - Navigation to Clients page redirected to dashboard. The /customer/index route may not exist or requires different navigation path.
clients_page.note: The Consulter button feature is implemented in DatatableComponent which is shared across all pages, so it should work on any page using this component.

no_react_errors.result: PASS - No error messages found on page

context_for_next_testing_agent: New 'Consulter' button (orange pencil) feature tested and working. The 4th action button in DataTableComponent opens a read-only quick view modal with 3 tabs (Identité, État & Tags, Localisation). Implementation in DataTableComponent.jsx lines 493-540 (actionTemplate) and lines 924-1065 (EntityQuickView component). Modal uses PrimeReact Dialog with className='lt-entity-dialog'. CSS styles in logitag-saas.css lines 2725-3012. Tested on Engins (/view/engin/index) and Tags (/tag/index) pages. Both pages show the Consulter button and modal works correctly. External API (Omniyat) has slow response times (5-15 seconds). Login credentials: admin / user@1234.
